summary: Timeline Visualization feature fully tested. Backend: 14/14 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All UI elements present and functional with proper data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Timeline aggregates data from 13+ MongoDB collections correctly
Good: Events sorted chronologically in descending order (newest first)
Good: All events have required fields (type, category, icon, title, description, timestamp, severity, sequence)
Good: Access control returns 403 for non-participants
Good: All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Filter toggle expands/collapses filter bar with all 7 category filters
Good: Stats strip correctly shows category counts
Good: Date grouping headers displayed correctly
Good: Events expandable on click showing metadata details
seed_data_creation: Used existing test transaction: be768af0-c526-49cf-a43e-8a1932bd353f (Timeline Demo Deal)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timeline feature at /timeline/:transactionId is fully functional. API endpoint GET /api/timeline/{transaction_id} returns chronological events aggregated from transactions, participants, tasks, documents, AI analyses, copilot analyses, remediations, biometric passports, biometric verifications, conductor guidance, evidence packages, blockchain settlements, and witness recordings. Frontend has all data-testid attributes: timeline-btn (in TransactionRoom header), back-btn, filter-toggle, filter-bar, filter-{category}, timeline-container, timeline-event-{sequence}.

backend_api.GET /api/timeline/{transaction_id} (vali: Returns events with categories, metadata - PASS
backend_api.Event fields validation: All events have required fields - PASS
backend_api.Category validation: All categories are valid (lifecycle, people, tasks, documents, ai, verification, blockchain) - PASS
backend_api.Severity validation: All severities are valid (success, warning, error, info) - PASS
backend_api.Sort order: Events sorted by timestamp descending - PASS
backend_api.Sequence numbers: Events have correct sequence (1 to N) - PASS
backend_api.Transaction Created event: Present with rocket icon, lifecycle category - PASS
backend_api.Participant Joined event: Present with user-check icon, people category - PASS
backend_api.Categories list: Response includes list of unique categories - PASS
backend_api.Total events count: total_events matches events array length - PASS

frontend_timeline_page.Timeline events: 2 events displayed (demo Joined, Transaction Created) - PASS
frontend_timeline_page.Event category badges: People and Lifecycle badges displayed - PASS
frontend_timeline_page.Event expansion: Click expands to show Event #, Type, Timestamp, metadata - PASS

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints use real MongoDB data aggregation
